mapper.update: INSERT INTO slow_sql_optimize_mark (instance_id, schema_name, digest, status, updated_by) VALUES (#{instanceId}, #{schemaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{digest}, #{status}, #{updatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ON CONFLICT (instance_id, COALESCE(schema_name, ''), digest) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at = now()
